intro: Ophryoscleria microcarpa is a type of aquatic plant commonly known as dwarf club moss or miniature club moss, which belongs to the family Rhachidaceae. This plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including inflammation and fever, due to its antipyretic and anti-inflammatory properties.
